## Checklist

- [ ] `just ci` passes locally (`cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo test`).
- [ ] Tests added/updated in the same change (unit, round-trip/snapshot, or headless UI).
- [ ] `hyprconf-core` stays free of any `iced`/GUI dependency.
- [ ] New source files carry the `// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0` header.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated and the workspace version bumped if user-visible.
- [ ] If the schema changed, paths still match the vendored `meta/` key set.
